name: far_targets_eq_15m
label: far_targets · 15m · equities
method: The far_targets signal run on liquid US equities at 15m on real Alpaca bars, across 8 symbols. Tests whether the zone/reversion logic transfers from crypto to equities and which timeframe carries it.
risk: Paper, resolved from real Alpaca bars. Research/data-collection — no edge claimed; gathering multi-symbol/timeframe numbers.

provenance.hypothesis: far_targets has a tradable edge on equities at 15m.
